chiefComplaint: Routine follow-up for hypertension and diabetes management
historyOfPresentIllness: Patient is a 40-year-old male with known hypertension and type 2 diabetes. He reports good medication adherence and has been monitoring his blood pressure and glucose levels at home. Recent home readings show blood pressure averaging 140-150/90-95 mmHg and fasting glucose 160-180 mg/dL.

reviewOfSystems.constitutional: No fever, weight loss, or fatigue
reviewOfSystems.respiratory: No shortness of breath or cough

physicalExamination.heent: Normocephalic, atraumatic. Pupils equal, round, reactive to light
physicalExamination.cardiovascular: Regular rate and rhythm, no murmurs, rubs or gallops
physicalExamination.neurological: Alert and oriented x3, grossly non-focal

medications.notes: Consider increasing dose if BP remains above goal

plan.followUp: In 3 months or sooner if blood pressure remains uncontrolled
